description: Defines the visible axis range with minimum and maximum bounds, optional tick step spacing, and scale type such as trigonometric or logarithmic.
utility: Set axis range with min, max, optional step, and optional scale type for a graph axis

arguments.name: step
arguments.description: Tick spacing on the axis (e.g., 1, 0.5, pi/4). If omitted, step is calculated automatically.

arguments.name: scale
arguments.description: Scale type for axis labels. 'trig' shows pi-fraction labels, 'log' is base-10 log, 'ln' is natural log, 'im' shows imaginary unit labels.

alternates.description: Set axis bounds with automatic tick step
Set axis bounds with explicit tick spacing
Pi-based axis labels for trigonometric function plots
When used inside plot(), restricts the plotted domain

examples.scenario: Range with custom step on both axes
Single x-range only (y defaults to -5 to 5)

examples.expression: G = g2d(at(2,2), 20, 30, range(-2*pi, 2*pi, pi/4, "trig"), range(-2, 2), type(trig))
G = g2d(at(2,2), 20, 30, range(-1, 1), range(-pi, pi, pi/4, "trig"), type(trig))

examples.scenario: Range used in polar plot domain
